# Elevate Design System

> SQLI's CSS-only design system built on DaisyUI with custom brand themes.

## Overview

Elevate Design System is a stateless CSS library providing themed components for SQLI applications. It does NOT include JavaScript framework integrations - those are the responsibility of consuming projects.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install git+https://gitlab-paris.sqli.com/SQLI/elevate-design-system.git
```

```css
@import '@sqli/elevate-design-system/dist/sqli-design-system.css';
@import '@sqli/elevate-design-system/dist/fonts.css';
```

```html
<html data-theme="sqli-light">
  <button class="btn btn-primary">Hello World</button>
</html>
```

## Themes

| Theme | Background | Primary | Usage |
|-------|------------|---------|-------|
| sqli-light | Cream (#FFFAF0) | Cobalt (#1F24E9) | Default |
| sqli-dark | Midnight (#0F0E2B) | Sky (#6DA5FF) | Dark mode |

## Brand Colors

- **Cream**: #FFFAF0 - Light background
- **Midnight**: #0F0E2B - Dark background, text
- **Cobalt**: #1F24E9 - Primary (light mode)
- **Sky**: #6DA5FF - Primary (dark mode)

## Typography

- **Font**: TWK Everett
- **Weights**: Light (300), Regular (400), Medium (500), Bold (700)

## Components (58 components)

All components use DaisyUI classes. Below is the complete reference.

---

### Actions (6 components)

#### Button
Interactive button element with multiple variants and states.
```html
<button class="btn">Default</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
<button class="btn btn-accent">Accent</button>
<button class="btn btn-info">Info</button>
<button class="btn btn-success">Success</button>
<button class="btn btn-warning">Warning</button>
<button class="btn btn-error">Error</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn btn-link">Link</button>
<button class="btn btn-outline">Outline</button>
<button class="btn btn-xs">Extra Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-md">Medium</button>
<button class="btn btn-lg">Large</button>
<button class="btn btn-wide">Wide</button>
<button class="btn btn-block">Block (full width)</button>
<button class="btn btn-circle">Circle</button>
<button class="btn btn-square">Square</button>
<button class="btn" disabled>Disabled</button>
<button class="btn loading loading-spinner">Loading</button>
```

#### Dropdown
Toggleable contextual overlays for menus and more.
```html
<div class="dropdown">
  <div tabindex="0" role="button" class="btn m-1">Click</div>
  <ul tabindex="0" class="dropdown-content menu bg-base-100 rounded-box z-1 w-52 p-2 shadow-sm">
    <li><a>Item 1</a></li>
    <li><a>Item 2</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
<!-- Positions: dropdown-end, dropdown-top, dropdown-bottom, dropdown-left, dropdown-right -->
<!-- Triggers: dropdown-hover, dropdown-open -->
```

#### FAB (Floating Action Button)
Fixed-position action button, typically in the corner of the screen.
```html
<button class="btn btn-circle btn-primary fixed bottom-4 right-4">
  <svg><!-- icon --></svg>
</button>
```

#### Modal
Dialog overlays for focused user interaction.
```html
<button class="btn" onclick="my_modal.showModal()">Open Modal</button>
<dialog id="my_modal" class="modal">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <h3 class="font-bold text-lg">Hello!</h3>
    <p class="py-4">Modal content here.</p>
    <div class="modal-action">
      <form method="dialog">
        <button class="btn">Close</button>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
  <form method="dialog" class="modal-backdrop">
    <button>close</button>
  </form>
</dialog>
```

#### Swap
Toggle between two states with animation.
```html
<label class="swap swap-rotate">
  <input type="checkbox" />
  <svg class="swap-on h-10 w-10 fill-current"><!-- on icon --></svg>
  <svg class="swap-off h-10 w-10 fill-current"><!-- off icon --></svg>
</label>
<!-- Variants: swap-rotate, swap-flip -->
```

#### Theme Controller
Toggle or select between themes.
```html
<input type="checkbox" value="sqli-dark" class="toggle theme-controller" />
<!-- Or with swap for icons -->
<label class="swap swap-rotate">
  <input type="checkbox" class="theme-controller" value="sqli-dark" />
  <svg class="swap-off h-6 w-6 fill-current"><!-- sun --></svg>
  <svg class="swap-on h-6 w-6 fill-current"><!-- moon --></svg>
</label>
```

---

### Data Display (12 components)

#### Accordion
Vertically stacked expandable sections.
```html
<div class="collapse collapse-arrow bg-base-100 border border-base-300">
  <input type="radio" name="my-accordion" checked />
  <div class="collapse-title font-semibold">Section 1</div>
  <div class="collapse-content text-sm">Content 1</div>
</div>
<div class="collapse collapse-arrow bg-base-100 border border-base-300">
  <input type="radio" name="my-accordion" />
  <div class="collapse-title font-semibold">Section 2</div>
  <div class="collapse-content text-sm">Content 2</div>
</div>
```

#### Avatar
User profile image with status indicators.
```html
<div class="avatar">
  <div class="w-24 rounded-full">
    <img src="avatar.jpg" alt="User" />
  </div>
</div>
<!-- With status: avatar online, avatar offline -->
<!-- Shapes: rounded-full, rounded, rounded-xl -->
<!-- Sizes: w-8, w-12, w-16, w-24, w-32 -->
<!-- Placeholder: avatar placeholder -->
```

#### Badge
Small status descriptor for elements.
```html
<span class="badge">Default</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary">Primary</span>
<span class="badge badge-secondary">Secondary</span>
<span class="badge badge-accent">Accent</span>
<span class="badge badge-info">Info</span>
<span class="badge badge-success">Success</span>
<span class="badge badge-warning">Warning</span>
<span class="badge badge-error">Error</span>
<span class="badge badge-outline">Outline</span>
<span class="badge badge-ghost">Ghost</span>
<!-- Sizes: badge-xs, badge-sm, badge-md, badge-lg -->
```

#### Card
Container for content with optional image and actions.
```html
<div class="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl">
  <figure><img src="image.jpg" alt="Image" /></figure>
  <div class="card-body">
    <h2 class="card-title">Title</h2>
    <p>Description text goes here.</p>
    <div class="card-actions justify-end">
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Variants: card-compact, card-side, image-full -->
<!-- With badge: <div class="badge badge-secondary">NEW</div> in card-title -->
```

#### Carousel
Slideshow for cycling through elements.
```html
<div class="carousel w-full">
  <div id="slide1" class="carousel-item relative w-full">
    <img src="1.jpg" class="w-full" />
    <div class="absolute left-5 right-5 top-1/2 flex -translate-y-1/2 justify-between">
      <a href="#slide4" class="btn btn-circle">❮</a>
      <a href="#slide2" class="btn btn-circle">❯</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

#### Chat Bubble
Speech bubble for chat interfaces.
```html
<div class="chat chat-start">
  <div class="chat-image avatar">
    <div class="w-10 rounded-full"><img src="avatar.jpg" /></div>
  </div>
  <div class="chat-header">Username <time class="text-xs opacity-50">12:45</time></div>
  <div class="chat-bubble">Message content</div>
  <div class="chat-footer opacity-50">Delivered</div>
</div>
<div class="chat chat-end">
  <div class="chat-bubble chat-bubble-primary">Response</div>
</div>
```

#### Collapse
Expandable/collapsible content panel.
```html
<div class="collapse bg-base-100 border border-base-300">
  <input type="checkbox" />
  <div class="collapse-title font-medium">Click to expand</div>
  <div class="collapse-content">Hidden content here.</div>
</div>
<!-- Variants: collapse-arrow, collapse-plus -->
```

#### Countdown
Animated countdown timer display.
```html
<span class="countdown font-mono text-6xl">
  <span style="--value:10;"></span>:
  <span style="--value:24;"></span>:
  <span style="--value:59;"></span>
</span>
```

#### Diff
Side-by-side comparison display.
```html
<div class="diff aspect-16/9">
  <div class="diff-item-1"><img src="before.jpg" /></div>
  <div class="diff-item-2"><img src="after.jpg" /></div>
  <div class="diff-resizer"></div>
</div>
```

#### Kbd (Keyboard)
Keyboard key representation.
```html
<kbd class="kbd">A</kbd>
<kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">Ctrl</kbd>
<kbd class="kbd kbd-lg">⌘</kbd>
<!-- Sizes: kbd-xs, kbd-sm, kbd-md, kbd-lg -->
```

#### List
Vertical list of items.
```html
<ul class="list bg-base-100 rounded-box shadow-md">
  <li class="list-row">
    <div><img class="size-10 rounded-box" src="img.jpg" /></div>
    <div>
      <div>Title</div>
      <div class="text-xs uppercase font-semibold opacity-60">Subtitle</div>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

#### Stat
Statistics display with title, value, and description.
```html
<div class="stats shadow">
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-figure text-primary"><svg><!-- icon --></svg></div>
    <div class="stat-title">Total Users</div>
    <div class="stat-value">25.6K</div>
    <div class="stat-desc">21% more than last month</div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Multiple stats: add more stat divs -->
<!-- Vertical: stats-vertical -->
```

#### Status
Online/offline status indicator.
```html
<div class="status status-primary"></div>
<div class="status status-success"></div>
<div class="status status-warning"></div>
<div class="status status-error"></div>
<!-- Sizes: status-xs, status-sm, status-md, status-lg -->
```

#### Table
Data table with sorting and selection.
```html
<div class="overflow-x-auto">
  <table class="table">
    <thead>
      <tr><th></th><th>Name</th><th>Job</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><th>1</th><td>John</td><td>Developer</td></tr>
      <tr class="hover"><th>2</th><td>Jane</td><td>Designer</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
<!-- Variants: table-zebra, table-pin-rows, table-pin-cols -->
<!-- Sizes: table-xs, table-sm, table-md, table-lg -->
```

#### Timeline
Vertical timeline for events.
```html
<ul class="timeline timeline-vertical">
  <li>
    <div class="timeline-start">2024</div>
    <div class="timeline-middle"><svg><!-- dot --></svg></div>
    <div class="timeline-end timeline-box">Event description</div>
    <hr />
  </li>
</ul>
<!-- Horizontal: timeline (without vertical) -->
```

#### Tooltip
Hover-triggered information popup.
```html
<div class="tooltip" data-tip="Tooltip text">
  <button class="btn">Hover me</button>
</div>
<!-- Positions: tooltip-top, tooltip-bottom, tooltip-left, tooltip-right -->
<!-- Colors: tooltip-primary, tooltip-secondary, tooltip-accent, etc. -->
<!-- Always open: tooltip-open -->
```

---

### Data Input (11 components)

#### Checkbox
Boolean input control.
```html
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox" />
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox checkbox-primary" checked />
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox checkbox-secondary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox checkbox-accent" />
<!-- Sizes: checkbox-xs, checkbox-sm, checkbox-md, checkbox-lg -->
```

#### Fieldset
Group related form elements.
```html
<fieldset class="fieldset">
  <legend class="fieldset-legend">Account</legend>
  <label class="fieldset-label">Username</label>
  <input type="text" class="input" />
</fieldset>
```

#### File Input
File upload control.
```html
<input type="file" class="file-input file-input-bordered w-full max-w-xs" />
<!-- Variants: file-input-primary, file-input-ghost -->
<!-- Sizes: file-input-xs, file-input-sm, file-input-md, file-input-lg -->
```

#### Label
Form field label with optional helper text.
```html
<label class="form-control w-full max-w-xs">
  <div class="label">
    <span class="label-text">What is your name?</span>
    <span class="label-text-alt">Required</span>
  </div>
  <input type="text" class="input input-bordered w-full max-w-xs" />
  <div class="label">
    <span class="label-text-alt">Helper text</span>
  </div>
</label>
```

#### Radio
Single selection from multiple options.
```html
<input type="radio" name="radio-1" class="radio" checked />
<input type="radio" name="radio-1" class="radio radio-primary" />
<input type="radio" name="radio-1" class="radio radio-secondary" />
<!-- Sizes: radio-xs, radio-sm, radio-md, radio-lg -->
```

#### Range
Slider input for numeric values.
```html
<input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="40" class="range" />
<input type="range" class="range range-primary" />
<!-- With steps -->
<input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="25" class="range range-xs" step="25" />
<!-- Sizes: range-xs, range-sm, range-md, range-lg -->
```

#### Rating
Star rating input.
```html
<div class="rating">
  <input type="radio" name="rating-1" class="mask mask-star" />
  <input type="radio" name="rating-1" class="mask mask-star" checked />
  <input type="radio" name="rating-1" class="mask mask-star" />
  <input type="radio" name="rating-1" class="mask mask-star" />
  <input type="radio" name="rating-1" class="mask mask-star" />
</div>
<!-- Half stars: rating-half with mask-star-2 mask-half-1, mask-half-2 -->
<!-- Sizes: rating-xs, rating-sm, rating-md, rating-lg -->
```

#### Select
Dropdown selection control.
```html
<select class="select select-bordered w-full max-w-xs">
  <option disabled selected>Pick one</option>
  <option>Option 1</option>
  <option>Option 2</option>
</select>
<!-- Variants: select-primary, select-secondary, select-ghost -->
<!-- Sizes: select-xs, select-sm, select-md, select-lg -->
```

#### Text Input
Single-line text input.
```html
<input type="text" placeholder="Type here" class="input input-bordered w-full max-w-xs" />
<!-- Variants: input-primary, input-secondary, input-accent, input-ghost -->
<!-- Sizes: input-xs, input-sm, input-md, input-lg -->
<!-- States: input-error, input-success, input-warning, input-info -->
```

#### Textarea
Multi-line text input.
```html
<textarea class="textarea textarea-bordered" placeholder="Bio"></textarea>
<!-- Variants: textarea-primary, textarea-secondary, textarea-ghost -->
<!-- Sizes: textarea-xs, textarea-sm, textarea-md, textarea-lg -->
```

#### Toggle
On/off switch control.
```html
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle" checked />
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle toggle-primary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle toggle-secondary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle toggle-accent" />
<!-- Sizes: toggle-xs, toggle-sm, toggle-md, toggle-lg -->
```

---

### Feedback (6 components)

#### Alert
Contextual feedback messages.
```html
<div role="alert" class="alert">
  <svg><!-- icon --></svg>
  <span>Default alert message.</span>
</div>
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-info"><span>Info</span></div>
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-success"><span>Success</span></div>
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-warning"><span>Warning</span></div>
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-error"><span>Error</span></div>
<!-- With actions -->
<div role="alert" class="alert">
  <span>Message</span>
  <div><button class="btn btn-sm">Action</button></div>
</div>
```

#### Loading
Loading spinners and indicators.
```html
<span class="loading loading-spinner loading-xs"></span>
<span class="loading loading-spinner loading-sm"></span>
<span class="loading loading-spinner loading-md"></span>
<span class="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
<!-- Types: loading-spinner, loading-dots, loading-ring, loading-ball, loading-bars, loading-infinity -->
<!-- Colors: text-primary, text-secondary, etc. -->
```

#### Progress
Linear progress indicator.
```html
<progress class="progress w-56" value="0" max="100"></progress>
<progress class="progress progress-primary w-56" value="25" max="100"></progress>
<progress class="progress progress-secondary w-56" value="50" max="100"></progress>
<!-- Indeterminate (no value attribute) -->
<progress class="progress w-56"></progress>
```

#### Radial Progress
Circular progress indicator.
```html
<div class="radial-progress" style="--value:70;" role="progressbar">70%</div>
<div class="radial-progress text-primary" style="--value:70; --size:12rem; --thickness:2px;">70%</div>
```

#### Skeleton
Placeholder loading state.
```html
<div class="skeleton h-32 w-32"></div>
<div class="skeleton h-4 w-28"></div>
<div class="skeleton h-4 w-full"></div>
<div class="skeleton h-4 w-full"></div>
<!-- Common patterns -->
<div class="flex w-52 flex-col gap-4">
  <div class="skeleton h-32 w-full"></div>
  <div class="skeleton h-4 w-28"></div>
  <div class="skeleton h-4 w-full"></div>
</div>
```

#### Toast
Notification popups.
```html
<div class="toast">
  <div class="alert alert-info"><span>New message arrived.</span></div>
</div>
<div class="toast toast-top toast-end">
  <div class="alert alert-success"><span>Saved successfully.</span></div>
</div>
<!-- Positions: toast-start, toast-center, toast-end, toast-top, toast-middle, toast-bottom -->
```

---

### Layout (8 components)

#### Divider
Horizontal or vertical separator.
```html
<div class="divider">OR</div>
<div class="divider divider-start">Start</div>
<div class="divider divider-end">End</div>
<!-- Vertical -->
<div class="flex w-full">
  <div class="card bg-base-100">Left</div>
  <div class="divider divider-horizontal">OR</div>
  <div class="card bg-base-100">Right</div>
</div>
<!-- Colors: divider-primary, divider-secondary, etc. -->
```

#### Drawer
Off-canvas sidebar navigation.
```html
<div class="drawer">
  <input id="my-drawer" type="checkbox" class="drawer-toggle" />
  <div class="drawer-content">
    <label for="my-drawer" class="btn btn-primary drawer-button">Open drawer</label>
  </div>
  <div class="drawer-side">
    <label for="my-drawer" class="drawer-overlay"></label>
    <ul class="menu bg-base-200 text-base-content min-h-full w-80 p-4">
      <li><a>Menu Item 1</a></li>
      <li><a>Menu Item 2</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Right side: drawer-end -->
```

#### Footer
Page footer with multiple sections.
```html
<footer class="footer bg-base-200 text-base-content p-10">
  <nav>
    <h6 class="footer-title">Services</h6>
    <a class="link link-hover">Branding</a>
    <a class="link link-hover">Design</a>
  </nav>
  <nav>
    <h6 class="footer-title">Company</h6>
    <a class="link link-hover">About us</a>
    <a class="link link-hover">Contact</a>
  </nav>
</footer>
<!-- Centered: footer-center -->
```

#### Hero
Large featured content section.
```html
<div class="hero min-h-screen bg-base-200">
  <div class="hero-content text-center">
    <div class="max-w-md">
      <h1 class="text-5xl font-bold">Hello there</h1>
      <p class="py-6">Description text.</p>
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Get Started</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- With image: hero-content flex-col lg:flex-row -->
<!-- Overlay: hero-overlay -->
```

#### Indicator
Position badges/notifications on elements.
```html
<div class="indicator">
  <span class="indicator-item badge badge-secondary">99+</span>
  <button class="btn">Inbox</button>
</div>
<!-- Positions: indicator-top, indicator-middle, indicator-bottom, indicator-start, indicator-center, indicator-end -->
```

#### Join
Group elements together with connected borders.
```html
<div class="join">
  <button class="btn join-item">Button 1</button>
  <button class="btn join-item">Button 2</button>
  <button class="btn join-item">Button 3</button>
</div>
<!-- Vertical: join-vertical -->
<!-- With inputs -->
<div class="join">
  <input class="input input-bordered join-item" placeholder="Email" />
  <button class="btn join-item">Subscribe</button>
</div>
```

#### Mask
Apply shape masks to images.
```html
<img class="mask mask-squircle" src="image.jpg" />
<img class="mask mask-heart" src="image.jpg" />
<img class="mask mask-hexagon" src="image.jpg" />
<img class="mask mask-star" src="image.jpg" />
<!-- Shapes: mask-squircle, mask-heart, mask-hexagon, mask-hexagon-2, mask-decagon, mask-pentagon, mask-diamond, mask-square, mask-circle, mask-star, mask-star-2, mask-triangle, mask-triangle-2, mask-triangle-3, mask-triangle-4 -->
```

#### Stack
Overlapping elements.
```html
<div class="stack">
  <div class="card bg-primary text-primary-content">Card 1</div>
  <div class="card bg-secondary text-secondary-content">Card 2</div>
  <div class="card bg-accent text-accent-content">Card 3</div>
</div>
```

---

### Navigation (8 components)

#### Breadcrumbs
Navigation path indicator.
```html
<div class="breadcrumbs text-sm">
  <ul>
    <li><a>Home</a></li>
    <li><a>Documents</a></li>
    <li>Current Page</li>
  </ul>
</div>
<!-- With icons: add svg inside <a> -->
```

#### Dock
Fixed bottom navigation bar.
```html
<div class="dock">
  <button class="dock-item dock-active">
    <svg><!-- icon --></svg>
    <span class="dock-label">Home</span>
  </button>
  <button class="dock-item">
    <svg><!-- icon --></svg>
    <span class="dock-label">Search</span>
  </button>
</div>
<!-- Sizes: dock-xs, dock-sm, dock-md, dock-lg -->
```

#### Link
Styled anchor elements.
```html
<a class="link">Default link</a>
<a class="link link-primary">Primary link</a>
<a class="link link-secondary">Secondary link</a>
<a class="link link-accent">Accent link</a>
<a class="link link-hover">Hover underline only</a>
```

#### Menu
Vertical or horizontal navigation menu.
```html
<ul class="menu bg-base-200 rounded-box w-56">
  <li><a>Item 1</a></li>
  <li><a>Item 2</a></li>
  <li>
    <details>
      <summary>Submenu</summary>
      <ul>
        <li><a>Subitem 1</a></li>
        <li><a>Subitem 2</a></li>
      </ul>
    </details>
  </li>
</ul>
<!-- Horizontal: menu-horizontal -->
<!-- Sizes: menu-xs, menu-sm, menu-md, menu-lg -->
<!-- With title: <li class="menu-title">Category</li> -->
```

#### Navbar
Top navigation bar.
```html
<div class="navbar bg-base-100">
  <div class="navbar-start">
    <a class="btn btn-ghost text-xl">Brand</a>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-center hidden lg:flex">
    <ul class="menu menu-horizontal px-1">
      <li><a>Item 1</a></li>
      <li><a>Item 2</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-end">
    <a class="btn">Button</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

#### Pagination
Page navigation for lists.
```html
<div class="join">
  <button class="join-item btn">«</button>
  <button class="join-item btn">1</button>
  <button class="join-item btn btn-active">2</button>
  <button class="join-item btn">3</button>
  <button class="join-item btn">»</button>
</div>
```

#### Steps
Progress steps indicator.
```html
<ul class="steps">
  <li class="step step-primary">Register</li>
  <li class="step step-primary">Choose plan</li>
  <li class="step">Purchase</li>
  <li class="step">Receive Product</li>
</ul>
<!-- Vertical: steps-vertical -->
<!-- With content: add data-content="?" attribute -->
```

#### Tabs
Tabbed interface navigation.
```html
<div role="tablist" class="tabs tabs-bordered">
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 1</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab tab-active">Tab 2</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 3</a>
</div>
<!-- Variants: tabs-boxed, tabs-lifted -->
<!-- Sizes: tabs-xs, tabs-sm, tabs-md, tabs-lg -->
```

---

### Mockup (4 components)

#### Browser Mockup
Browser window frame.
```html
<div class="mockup-browser border-base-300 border">
  <div class="mockup-browser-toolbar">
    <div class="input border-base-300 border">https://example.com</div>
  </div>
  <div class="bg-base-200 flex justify-center px-4 py-16">Content</div>
</div>
```

#### Code Mockup
Code editor window frame.
```html
<div class="mockup-code">
  <pre data-prefix="$"><code>npm install daisyui</code></pre>
  <pre data-prefix=">" class="text-warning"><code>installing...</code></pre>
  <pre data-prefix=">" class="text-success"><code>Done!</code></pre>
</div>
```

#### Phone Mockup
Mobile device frame.
```html
<div class="mockup-phone">
  <div class="camera"></div>
  <div class="display">
    <div class="artboard artboard-demo phone-1">Content</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

#### Window Mockup
Desktop window frame.
```html
<div class="mockup-window border-base-300 border">
  <div class="bg-base-200 flex justify-center px-4 py-16">Content</div>
</div>
```

## Code Examples

### Button Variants
```html
<button class="btn">Default</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
<button class="btn btn-accent">Accent</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn btn-link">Link</button>
```

### Button Sizes
```html
<button class="btn btn-xs">Extra Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-md">Medium</button>
<button class="btn btn-lg">Large</button>
```

### Card
```html
<div class="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl">
  <figure><img src="image.jpg" alt="Image" /></figure>
  <div class="card-body">
    <h2 class="card-title">Title</h2>
    <p>Description</p>
    <div class="card-actions justify-end">
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Form Input with Label
```html
<label class="form-control w-full">
  <div class="label">
    <span class="label-text">Email</span>
  </div>
  <input type="email" class="input input-bordered" />
</label>
```

### Alert
```html
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-info">
  <span>Info message</span>
</div>
```

### Tabs
```html
<div role="tablist" class="tabs tabs-bordered">
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 1</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab tab-active">Tab 2</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 3</a>
</div>
```

### Theme Switching
```javascript
// Toggle between themes
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'sqli-dark');
```

```html
<!-- DaisyUI theme controller -->
<input type="checkbox" value="sqli-dark" class="toggle theme-controller" />
```

## Distribution

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| dist/sqli-design-system.css | Full CSS (~267 KB) |
| dist/sqli-design-system.min.css | Minified CSS (~198 KB) |
| dist/tokens.css | CSS variables only (~3 KB) |
| dist/fonts.css | Font declarations (~2 KB) |
| dist/fonts/ | TWK Everett font files |
| dist/logos/ | SQLI logos (SVG & PNG) |

## Platform.sh CDN

No build required:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/assets/sqli-design-system.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/assets/fonts.css" />
```

## Resources

- Storybook: https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/
- Repository: https://gitlab-paris.sqli.com/SQLI/elevate-design-system
- DaisyUI Docs: https://daisyui.com/components/

## SQLI Brand Guidelines

- Logo "sqli" always lowercase
- In text, write "SQLI" uppercase
- Promise: "Elevate. Digitally" (period only after "Elevate")
